subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! I swear by the Lord of the Kingdom of Names that those among the divines and rulers who have turned away are consumed this day with the fire of hatred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل بها قسم بمالک ملکوت اسما که معرضین از علما و امرا که امروز بنار بغضا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
